Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Azura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Azura is Kai's long, slightly curved sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Azura is the key to Kai's Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Azura is an item that Kai carries on his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Azura is a gleaming sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Azura rests against Kai's shoulder while he meditates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Azura is a sword drawn from empty air by Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Azura is a sword that Kai gives to Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Azura can stretch out from Kai's fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Azura is the seventh Demon Fang forged by the Wanderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Azura is a Demon Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Azura is a sword that can vanish from Simon's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Azura is a seven-foot length of steel used by Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon can make Azura vanish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Azura is a sword that Simon can summon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon summoned Azura into his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Azura is a seven-foot unbreakable blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Simon wishes he had Azura's hilt in his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Azura is a sword that Simon rests on a wooden rack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Azura is a sword that rests on a wooden rack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Simon can summon Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Azura is one of Simon's gifts.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Azura is someone Kai misses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Azura is a gleaming blade in the House's entry hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Azura was in Simon's bathroom in Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Azura is a gleaming blade used by Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Azura is a sword that can be banished back to Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Azura can be reached through a mental call.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Azura is a sword with a black-wrapped hilt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Simon moves Azura through a Valinhall Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Simon can call Azura by summoning steel and essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Azura is something Simon carries on the grass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Simon dropped Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon sweeps Azura toward the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Azura's blade is almost twice as long as the Ragnarus sword.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Simon pulled Azura down from the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Azura is a seven-foot mirror-bright and slightly curving metal sword that resides in Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Azura has an awkward length.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Azura is a sword that cannot talk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Azura is a silver-gleaming object summoned by Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Azura is a person who picks people who aren't afraid to start fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Azura is a weapon with a hilt held by Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon thrusts Azura at the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Azura is associated with Simon and Otoku.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon reaches for Azura's hilt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Simon cannot summon or banish anything within the House because he did not bring Azura with him.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Mad King manifests holding a black Scythe.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
